summary: Verified new BecomeSponsorDialog (PayPal.Me + QR flow) and ran regression on admin/sponsor + core spin. All checks pass. Footer button opens dialog with $29/month + First month FREE badge, paypal-pay-link href is EXACTLY https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/stevelammerts/29 (target=_blank), paypal-qr src=/paypal-qr.jpg returns 200 (naturalWidth=815, loaded), sponsor-email-link and feedback-link are mailto:stevelammerts@gmail.com. Old request-sponsorship-link removed. Backend regression: 14/14 pytest pass (admin login correct/wrong pw, JWT, sponsor CRUD, sponsor injection for ZIP 10001 food search, inactive hidden, category/cuisine filters, spin/create/curated regressions). Core spin flow with ZIP 10001 returned real Google spot (Hudson Yards Tavern), '5 more to consider' visible, Use my location button present, Add-spot dialog contains no add-sponsored-switch.
critical_code_review_comments: BecomeSponsorDialog.jsx is small and clean; PAYPAL_ME constant matches spec exactly.
QR image /paypal-qr.jpg is 136KB - acceptable but could be optimized to <50KB webp for faster dialog open.
server.py still ~760 lines (noted in iter_15); no new backend code in this iteration.
seed_data_creation: Regression test suite creates and self-cleans TEST_ sponsors via module teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: No backend changes since iter_15. Only new UI is BecomeSponsorDialog rendered inside sponsorship-cta in Home footer. Verify by opening dialog and checking exact PayPal.Me URL and QR src. All required data-testids present.
